---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(rsconnect)
library(kableExtra)
library(nflfastR)
library(nflreadr)
library(slider)
library(xgboost)
```


```{r}
load("WorkingModelData.RData")
```


```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# Exponential Decay Feature Engineering for Best Ball Fantasy Projections
# Replaces flat rolling windows (_16g, _4g) with decay-weighted stats
#
# Design decisions:
#   - NO manual shrinkage toward position mean. Instead, games_of_data is
#     included as an explicit model feature so XGBoost learns the appropriate
#     adjustment conditional on draft capital signals (bucket, pos_rank).
#   - Rookies / low-sample players have decay features imputed to 0 (not
#     position mean), so games_of_data = 0 cleanly signals "no history —
#     fall back on bucket/pos_rank."
#   - Cross-season carry-over seeds slow-window features from end of prior
#     season so veterans don't start a new year cold.
# ==============================================================================
 

 
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. DECAY PARAMETERS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# These are starting values for hyperparameter tuning (see Section 7).
# Tune via time-series cross-validation minimizing pinball loss.
 
# FAST decay: half-life ~3 games — captures recent form / hot streaks
LAMBDA_FAST <- 0.80
 
# SLOW decay: half-life ~14 games — captures baseline talent level
LAMBDA_SLOW <- 0.95
 
# Half-life formula for reference: log(0.5) / log(lambda)
# LAMBDA_FAST -> ~3.1 games | LAMBDA_SLOW -> ~13.5 games
 
 
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. CORE HELPER: decay-weighted mean + SD in one pass
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
#' Compute decay-weighted mean and standard deviation
#'
#' @param x      Numeric vector of stat values (chronological, oldest first)
#' @param lambda Decay factor (0 < lambda <= 1)
#' @return Named list: wmean, wsd, eff_n (effective sample size)
decay_stats <- function(x, lambda) {
  n <- length(x)
  if (n == 0) return(list(wmean = NA_real_, wsd = NA_real_, eff_n = 0))
 
  # Most recent game = weight 1; each step back multiplied by lambda
  weights <- lambda ^ ((n - 1):0)
 
  w_sum  <- sum(weights)
  wmean  <- sum(weights * x) / w_sum
 
  # Reliability-corrected weighted variance (analogous to n-1 denominator)
  w2_sum <- sum(weights ^ 2)
  wvar   <- sum(weights * (x - wmean) ^ 2) / (w_sum - w2_sum / w_sum)
  wsd    <- sqrt(max(wvar, 0))
 
  # Effective N: equivalent number of equally-weighted observations
  eff_n  <- w_sum ^ 2 / w2_sum
 
  list(wmean = wmean, wsd = wsd, eff_n = eff_n)
}
 
 
build_decay_features <- function(df) {

  stat_map <- list(
    targets       = "rec_attempt",
    receptions    = "receptions",
    rec_yards     = "rec_yards_gained",
    rush_yards    = "rush_yards_gained",
    rush_att      = "rush_attempt",
    pass_yards    = "pass_yards_gained",
    pass_att      = "pass_attempt",
    pass_comp     = "pass_completions",
    fantasy_pts   = "total_fantasy_points",
    pass_tds      = "pass_touchdown",
    scrimmage_tds = "scrimmage_TDs",
    fumbles       = "fumbles"
  )

  df <- df %>% arrange(gsis_id, season, week)

  # --- 3a: Within-season expanding window ---

  compute_player_season_features <- function(player_df) {
    n_rows <- nrow(player_df)
    out    <- player_df

    for (stem in names(stat_map)) {
      for (sfx in c("_fast_avg", "_fast_sd", "_slow_avg", "_slow_sd")) {
        out[[paste0(stem, sfx)]] <- NA_real_
      }
    }
    out[["eff_n_fast"]]          <- NA_real_
    out[["eff_n_slow"]]          <- NA_real_
    out[["games_played_season"]] <- NA_integer_

    for (i in seq_len(n_rows)) {
      if (i == 1) {
        out[["games_played_season"]][i] <- 0L
        next
      }

      hist_idx <- seq_len(i - 1)
      out[["games_played_season"]][i] <- length(hist_idx)

      for (stem in names(stat_map)) {
        raw_col  <- stat_map[[stem]]
        hist_vec <- player_df[[raw_col]][hist_idx]

        fast <- decay_stats(hist_vec, LAMBDA_FAST)
        slow <- decay_stats(hist_vec, LAMBDA_SLOW)

        out[[paste0(stem, "_fast_avg")]][i] <- fast$wmean
        out[[paste0(stem, "_fast_sd" )]][i] <- fast$wsd
        out[[paste0(stem, "_slow_avg")]][i] <- slow$wmean
        out[[paste0(stem, "_slow_sd" )]][i] <- slow$wsd
      }

      fp_fast <- decay_stats(player_df[["total_fantasy_points"]][hist_idx], LAMBDA_FAST)
      fp_slow <- decay_stats(player_df[["total_fantasy_points"]][hist_idx], LAMBDA_SLOW)
      out[["eff_n_fast"]][i] <- fp_fast$eff_n
      out[["eff_n_slow"]][i] <- fp_slow$eff_n
    }
    out
  }

  message("Computing within-season decay features...")
  df_decay <- df %>%
    group_by(gsis_id, season) %>%
    group_modify(~ compute_player_season_features(.x)) %>%
    ungroup()

  # --- 3b: Cross-season carry-over for Week 1 (veterans only) ---
  # Explicitly loop over slow columns instead of using cur_column()
  # to avoid dplyr version compatibility issues

  slow_avg_cols <- names(df_decay)[str_ends(names(df_decay), "_slow_avg")]
  slow_sd_cols  <- names(df_decay)[str_ends(names(df_decay), "_slow_sd")]

  prior_season_slow <- df_decay %>%
    group_by(gsis_id, season) %>%
    filter(week == max(week)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(carry_season = season + 1) %>%
    select(gsis_id, carry_season,
           all_of(slow_avg_cols), all_of(slow_sd_cols),
           eff_n_slow) %>%
    rename_with(~ paste0("prior_", .), -c(gsis_id, carry_season))

  df_decay <- df_decay %>%
    left_join(prior_season_slow,
              by = c("gsis_id", "season" = "carry_season"))

  # Fill Week 1 NAs with prior season values column by column
  for (col in c(slow_avg_cols, slow_sd_cols)) {
    prior_col <- paste0("prior_", col)
    df_decay <- df_decay %>%
      group_by(gsis_id, season) %>%
      mutate(!!col := if_else(
        is.na(.data[[col]]) & week == min(week),
        .data[[prior_col]],
        .data[[col]]
      )) %>%
      ungroup()
  }

  # Carry forward eff_n_slow for week 1
  df_decay <- df_decay %>%
    group_by(gsis_id, season) %>%
    mutate(
      eff_n_slow = if_else(
        is.na(eff_n_slow) & week == min(week),
        prior_eff_n_slow,
        eff_n_slow
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(-starts_with("prior_"))

  # --- 3c: Zero-impute remaining NAs (true rookies, first career game) ---

  message("Zero-imputing NAs for players with no prior history...")

  decay_avg_sd_cols <- names(df_decay)[
    str_detect(names(df_decay), "_(fast|slow)_(avg|sd)$")
  ]

  df_decay <- df_decay %>%
    mutate(
      across(all_of(decay_avg_sd_cols), ~ replace_na(.x, 0)),
      eff_n_fast          = replace_na(eff_n_fast, 0),
      eff_n_slow          = replace_na(eff_n_slow, 0),
      games_played_season = replace_na(games_played_season, 0L),
      games_of_data       = pmin(eff_n_slow, 16)
    )

  # --- 3d: Derived ratio features (nonlinear only) ---

  message("Computing derived ratio features...")

  df_decay <- df_decay %>%
    mutate(
      catch_rate_slow    = receptions_slow_avg / pmax(targets_slow_avg,  0.1),
      ypt_slow           = rec_yards_slow_avg  / pmax(targets_slow_avg,  0.1),
      ypc_slow           = rush_yards_slow_avg / pmax(rush_att_slow_avg, 0.1),
      ypa_slow           = pass_yards_slow_avg / pmax(pass_att_slow_avg, 0.1),
      comp_rate_slow     = pass_comp_slow_avg  / pmax(pass_att_slow_avg, 0.1),
      catch_rate_fast    = receptions_fast_avg / pmax(targets_fast_avg,  0.1),
      ypt_fast           = rec_yards_fast_avg  / pmax(targets_fast_avg,  0.1),
      ypc_fast           = rush_yards_fast_avg / pmax(rush_att_fast_avg, 0.1),
      fp_volatility_fast = fantasy_pts_fast_sd / pmax(fantasy_pts_fast_avg, 0.5),
      fp_volatility_slow = fantasy_pts_slow_sd / pmax(fantasy_pts_slow_avg, 0.5)
    )

  df_decay
}

finalize_model_data <- function(df) {
  leakage_cols <- c(
    "pass_attempt", "rec_attempt", "rush_attempt",
    "pass_completions", "receptions",
    "pass_yards_gained", "rec_yards_gained", "rush_yards_gained",
    "pass_touchdown", "pass_interception",
    "total_yards_gained", "scrimmage_TDs", "fumbles"
  )
  df %>% select(-any_of(leakage_cols))
}
```

```{r}
model_data_v2 <- build_decay_features(model_data)
model_data_v2 <- finalize_model_data(model_data_v2)

cat("Rows:", nrow(model_data_v2), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(model_data_v2), "\n")
```

#RB Modeling Start
```{r}
rb_model_data <- model_data_v2 %>%
  filter(position == "RB") %>%
  select(
    # Identifiers (not features, but useful to keep for debugging)
    gsis_id, season, week, full_name,
    
    # Target
    total_fantasy_points,
    
    # Context
    proj, total_line, pos_rank, bucket, experience,
    report_status, starter_injury_status,
    games_of_data, games_played_season,
    
    # Volume
    rush_att_fast_avg, rush_att_slow_avg,
    targets_fast_avg, targets_slow_avg,
    
    # Efficiency
    ypc_fast, ypc_slow, ypt_fast, ypt_slow,
    
    # TDs
    scrimmage_tds_fast_avg, scrimmage_tds_slow_avg,
    scrimmage_tds_fast_sd, scrimmage_tds_slow_sd,
    
    # Fantasy points
    fantasy_pts_fast_avg, fantasy_pts_slow_avg,
    fantasy_pts_fast_sd, fantasy_pts_slow_sd,
    
    # Volatility
    fp_volatility_fast, fp_volatility_slow,
    
    # Yards SDs
    rush_yards_fast_sd, rush_yards_slow_sd,
    rec_yards_fast_sd, rec_yards_slow_sd
  )

cat("RB rows:", nrow(rb_model_data), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(rb_model_data), "\n")
```


```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# Walk-Forward Cross-Validation Fold Setup
# ==============================================================================

# Define fold structure
# Train on all seasons up to fold year, validate on fold year
folds <- list(
  fold1 = list(train_seasons = 2015:2019, val_season = 2020),
  fold2 = list(train_seasons = 2015:2020, val_season = 2021),
  fold3 = list(train_seasons = 2015:2021, val_season = 2022),
  fold4 = list(train_seasons = 2015:2022, val_season = 2023)
)

# Helper function to split rb_model_data into train/validate for a given fold
make_fold_data <- function(data, fold) {
  train <- data %>% filter(season %in% fold$train_seasons)
  val   <- data %>% filter(season == fold$val_season)
  list(train = train, val = val)
}

# Verify fold sizes
cat("Fold sizes:\n")
for (fold_name in names(folds)) {
  fold_data <- make_fold_data(rb_model_data, folds[[fold_name]])
  cat(sprintf(
    "%s — train: %d rows (%d-%d), val: %d rows (%d)\n",
    fold_name,
    nrow(fold_data$train),
    min(folds[[fold_name]]$train_seasons),
    max(folds[[fold_name]]$train_seasons),
    nrow(fold_data$val),
    folds[[fold_name]]$val_season
  ))
}
```

```{r}


# ==============================================================================
# Lambda Tuning Loop — 2x2 grid (expand to 4x4 once confirmed working)
# ==============================================================================

# --- Grid ---
lambda_fast_grid <- c(0.70, 0.75, 0.80, 0.85)
lambda_slow_grid <- c(0.93, 0.95, 0.97, 0.99)

# --- Pinball loss function ---
# The correct scoring rule for quantile regression.
# alpha = 0.50 for the median model
pinball_loss <- function(y, yhat, alpha = 0.50) {
  residual <- y - yhat
  mean(if_else(residual >= 0, alpha * residual, (alpha - 1) * residual))
}

# --- Columns the model actually trains on (no identifiers, no target) ---
feature_cols <- c(
  "proj", "total_line", "pos_rank", "bucket", "experience",
  "report_status", "starter_injury_status",
  "games_of_data", "games_played_season",
  "rush_att_fast_avg", "rush_att_slow_avg",
  "targets_fast_avg", "targets_slow_avg",
  "ypc_fast", "ypc_slow",
  "ypt_fast", "ypt_slow",
  "scrimmage_tds_fast_avg", "scrimmage_tds_slow_avg",
  "scrimmage_tds_fast_sd", "scrimmage_tds_slow_sd",
  "fantasy_pts_fast_avg", "fantasy_pts_slow_avg",
  "fantasy_pts_fast_sd", "fantasy_pts_slow_sd",
  "rush_yards_fast_sd", "rush_yards_slow_sd",
  "rec_yards_fast_sd", "rec_yards_slow_sd"
)

# --- Helper: rebuild RB features with given lambdas ---
build_rb_features <- function(data, lf, ls) {
  
  LAMBDA_FAST <<- lf
  LAMBDA_SLOW <<- ls
  
  build_decay_features(data) %>%
    finalize_model_data() %>%
    filter(position == "RB") %>%
    select(
      gsis_id, season, week, full_name,
      total_fantasy_points,
      all_of(feature_cols)
    )
}


# --- Helper: prepare xgb.DMatrix from a dataframe ---
make_dmatrix <- function(df) {
  # One-hot encode categoricals
  mat <- model.matrix(
    ~ . - 1,
    data = df %>% select(all_of(feature_cols))
  )
  xgb.DMatrix(data = mat, label = df$total_fantasy_points)
}

# --- XGBoost params for median model ---
xgb_params <- list(
  objective        = "reg:quantileerror",
  quantile_alpha   = 0.50,
  eta              = 0.05,
  max_depth        = 5,
  subsample        = 0.8,
  colsample_bytree = 0.8,
  min_child_weight = 10
)

# ==============================================================================
# Main tuning loop
# ==============================================================================

results <- list()

for (lf in lambda_fast_grid) {
  for (ls in lambda_slow_grid) {
    
    combo_name <- paste0("lf", lf, "_ls", ls)
    cat(sprintf("\n--- Testing lambda_fast=%.2f, lambda_slow=%.2f ---\n", lf, ls))
    
    # Rebuild features with this lambda combo
    cat("  Rebuilding features...\n")
    rb_data_tuning <- build_rb_features(model_data, lf, ls)
    
    fold_losses <- numeric(length(folds))
    
    for (fold_idx in seq_along(folds)) {
      fold      <- folds[[fold_idx]]
      fold_data <- make_fold_data(rb_data_tuning, fold)
      
      dtrain <- make_dmatrix(fold_data$train)
      dval   <- make_dmatrix(fold_data$val)
      
      # Train with early stopping
      model <- xgb.train(
        params  = xgb_params,
        data    = dtrain,
        nrounds = 500,
        watchlist = list(val = dval),
        early_stopping_rounds = 30,
        verbose = 0
      )
      
      # Evaluate pinball loss on validation set
      preds <- predict(model, dval)
      actual <- fold_data$val$total_fantasy_points
      loss <- pinball_loss(actual, preds, alpha = 0.50)
      fold_losses[fold_idx] <- loss
      
      cat(sprintf("  Fold %d val pinball loss: %.4f (stopped at round %d)\n",
                  fold_idx, loss, model$best_iteration))
    }
    
    avg_loss <- mean(fold_losses)
    cat(sprintf("  Average pinball loss: %.4f\n", avg_loss))
    
    results[[combo_name]] <- list(
      lambda_fast  = lf,
      lambda_slow  = ls,
      fold_losses  = fold_losses,
      avg_loss     = avg_loss
    )
  }
}

# ==============================================================================
# Summary
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n--- Lambda Tuning Results ---\n")
results_df <- map_dfr(results, ~ tibble(
  lambda_fast = .x$lambda_fast,
  lambda_slow = .x$lambda_slow,
  fold1_loss  = .x$fold_losses[1],
  fold2_loss  = .x$fold_losses[2],
  fold3_loss  = .x$fold_losses[3],
  fold4_loss  = .x$fold_losses[4],
  avg_loss    = .x$avg_loss
))

print(results_df %>% arrange(avg_loss))
```
